reason: The sole finding is a fabricated image alt text. The text 'ユーザ登録情報電文受信処理フロー' is not present in the source RST but is contextually accurate — it describes the processing flow diagram that the image depicts, derivable from the document title. Alt text is image metadata; it carries no technical content (field specs, byte counts, entity mappings) that a developer would act on. The knowledge file's substantive sections (s1 machine-readable process summary, s2 full message/record specs, s3 entity table) are all correct and complete. An AI agent relying on this file would not be misled into any incorrect technical decision by this alt text.

findings_assessment.justification: The fabricated alt text 'ユーザ登録情報電文受信処理フロー' is image metadata only. It is contextually accurate (matches the document's subject) and carries no technical information that could mislead a developer. All actionable content — processing overview, INPUT/OUTPUT, message byte layout, and entity column mappings — is faithfully reproduced from the source and unaffected. The finding persisted through D→E because the Phase E agent produced an identical output, likely judging the alt text acceptable given its descriptive accuracy; removing it would reduce rather than improve the knowledge file's usefulness to agents that cannot view images directly.
